news.headline: Billionaire proposes plan to save struggling TikTok as options run out.
Jacques Gilbert appointed as Chief Strategy & Business Development Officer at Topcon Healthcare, focusing on Healthcare from the Eye™ initiative.
news.summary: Topcon Healthcare, Inc., a prominent medical devices and digital healthcare solutions company based in Oakland, N.J., has appointed Jacques Gilbert as its Chief Strategy and Business Development Officer. In his new role, Jacques will be responsible for spearheading the advancement and implementation of Topcon Healthcare’s business strategy, with a specific focus on the company’s innovative Healthcare from the Eye™ program. This initiative is a revolutionary connected care ecosystem that harnesses the power of oculomics, the scientific foundation behind AI-powered healthcare solutions. This strategic move underscores Topcon Healthcare's commitment to driving advancements in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Optimizely ends 2024 with strong growth, aims to enhance products, partnerships, and market position in 2025.
news.summary: A prominent provider of digital experience platforms, Optimizely, is gearing up for 2025 with a firm commitment to enhancing its product range, global collaborations, and market presence. Based in New York, the company is set to fortify its position as a digital experience leader. The milestones achieved by Optimizely are being commended as it embarks on the new year.

news.headline: RCP Advisors acknowledged in Best Places to Work in Money Management awards by Pensions & Investments, promoting employee engagement.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, RCP Advisors, a private equity investment firm specializing in North American small buyout fund managers, was acknowledged in the 2024 Best Places to Work in Money Management awards by Pensions & Investments. This recognition came through the 13th annual survey and recognition program aimed at highlighting top employers in the money management sector. Katie Tarpey, RCP Advisors' Head of Human Resources, expressed gratitude for the honor. The firm focuses on strategic talent management, active employee engagement, and innovative solutions to foster an environment where all employees can excel.

news.headline: Elon Musk's company to shut down the government, according to reports.
France's PM Bayrou: I hope to have a budget by mid-February.
Municipal bonds drop as Fed reduces rate cut expectations.
Verndale named Optimizely Customer Choice Partner of the Year for 2024, celebrating innovation and service excellence.
news.summary: Verndale, a digital experience agency based in Boston, has been praised for its innovative implementation and exceptional service as an Optimizely solution partner. This recognition highlights the company's expertise in strategy, design, and development. The acknowledgment was made on December 19, 2024, showcasing Verndale's leadership in the industry.

news.headline: NorthEast Community Bancorp reveals their latest quarterly cash dividend to shareholders.
Donegal Group Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.1725 per share for Class A common stock and $0.155 per share for Class B common stock. Payable on Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Marietta, Pennsylvania, on December 19, 2024, Donegal Group Inc. announced that it will be issuing dividends to its shareholders. The company's board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1725 per share for Class A common stock (NASDAQ:DGICA) and $0.155 per share for Class B common stock (NASDAQ:DGICB). These dividends are set to be paid on February 18, 2025, to shareholders on record as of February 4, 2025.

news.headline: Trice Contracting Inc. offers expert masonry services in New York. Demand grows for residential, commercial projects.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Long Island City, New York, it was reported that masonry is a longstanding construction method that remains in high demand in the state. The need for professional masonry services is increasing, especially for residential, commercial, and historical restoration projects. This highlights the enduring popularity and significance of masonry in the construction industry.

news.headline: Casio celebrates 50th anniversary with launch of CRW-001 Ring Watch, honoring legacy of innovation in watchmaking.
news.summary: In Dover, N.J., on December 19, 2024, Casio America, Inc. celebrates its 50th anniversary in watchmaking by introducing the CRW-001 Ring Watch. This revolutionary watch symbolizes Casio's history of innovation, merging style and utility.

news.headline: Great American Family's Christmas franchise boosted its growth, making it a Top 25 channel within three years of launch.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, it was reported that the cable television network Great American Family, which experienced rapid growth in 2023, achieved a significant milestone by entering the Top 25 channels list in November. This network now ranks well for households and individuals aged 2 and above within its coverage area. This achievement was attributed to the continuous expansion and success in its fourth year, showcasing its appeal to viewers.

news.headline: Chartwells introduces Scope 3 emissions tracking for campus dining programs, assisting colleges with sustainability goals.
news.summary: A groundbreaking development in the industry, Chartwells is pioneering a new approach to assisting colleges and universities in achieving their sustainability objectives by providing unique insights into the impacts of their dining programs. Based in Charlotte, N.C., as of December 19, 2024, Chartwells Higher Education is leading the way as a reputable provider in contract food services for higher education institutions.

news.headline: Cedro Participações wins auction for Port of Itaguaí expansion with BRL 3.7 billion investment, becoming the first 100% Brazilian mining company to do so.
news.summary: A Brazilian mining company has made history by investing a total of BRL 3.7 billion to vertically integrate its operations. Cedro Participações emerged victorious in the auction for the ITG-02 area at the Port of Itaguaí (RJ), marking a significant milestone for the company. This move positions Cedro Participações as the first 100% Brazilian mining company to accomplish verticalization in its operations. The auction, which took place on Wednesday, highlights the company's strategic expansion efforts in MINAS GERAIS, Brazil.

news.headline: k0smotron wins InfoWorld Technology of the Year Award 2024 for Application Management.
news.summary: A company based in Campbell, California, k0smotron, has recently been honored with the prestigious InfoWorld Technology of the Year Award for 2024 in the category of Application Management. This recognition highlights k0smotron's outstanding contribution to the industry.

news.headline: FDA rejects glepaglutide NDA for short bowel syndrome treatment in U.S. Important figures: 0 approvals, 1 Complete Response Letter.
French PM Bayrou: I would not want the French public deficit to go above the 6% level.
Mynth's Multi-Chain IDO in January 2025 to offer cross-chain protocol allowing swap of any token on any network.
news.summary: Prague, December 19, 2024 - The revolutionary decentralized cross-chain protocol Coinscribble by Coinbound/Mynth is poised to revolutionize blockchain interoperability through its upcoming Initial DEX Offering (IDO). This innovative platform allows users to exchange any token for any other token across various networks. Functioning as a layer-zero solution...

news.headline: Dr. Jeff Osborne appointed as Chief Dental Officer of Smile Source, a network of independent dental practices.
news.summary: In Houston on December 19, 2024, Smile Source, the leading network of independent dental practices in the country, revealed the selection of Dr. Jeff Osborne as its first-ever Chief Dental Officer (CDO). Dr. Osborne, bringing more than 35 years of notable experience in clinical and leadership roles, now holds this key position within the organization.

news.headline: Bitcoin price drops by 6.5% to $96,500 as $2.7 billion worth of BTC sold; larger investors await entry points amid bullish sentiment.
news.summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) saw a 6.5% decrease in prices in the last 24 hours following the Federal Reserve meeting, with a notable $2.7 billion worth (26,000 BTC) sell-off marked as the sixth-highest daily outflow this year, as stated by CoinDesk senior analyst James Van Straten. Despite retail investors staying relatively inactive, larger investors are patiently observing for favorable entry points, indicating a positive sentiment in the market. Crypto trader Roman highlights the 5% dip as insignificant, attributing it to market overleveraging and deems the correction as crucial for Bitcoin's continuous trend.

news.headline: 4Sight Labs and Washington Counties Risk Pool partner to improve inmate care with wearable sensors in correctional facilities.
news.summary: 4Sight Labs and Washington Counties Risk Pool have joined forces to transform safety and welfare monitoring in correctional facilities. The collaboration was announced in Olympia, Washington on December 20, 2024. This partnership aims to address the critical issues surrounding the safety and care of inmates. The innovative approach is driven by the increasing need to enhance security measures in correctional facilities. This initiative will lead to the deployment of advanced technologies and systems to ensure the well-being of incarcerated individuals. Both entities are committed to revolutionizing the conventional methods of monitoring and ensuring a safer environment for all. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards improving conditions in correctional facilities and underscores the importance of adopting modern solutions in the criminal justice system.

news.headline: Exhibit in Nashville features works by Haitian American artists M. Florine Démosthène and Didier William, exploring cultural duality and immigrant experience. January 31–May 4, 2025.
news.summary: "Experience the multimedia exhibition 'What the Body Carries' by M. Florine Démosthène and Didier William at Frist Art Museum in Nashville, Tennessee, from January 31 to May 4, 2025. Featuring a collection of figurative paintings, collages, and more, this showcase promises a unique exploration of art. Mark your calendars for this exciting event." Character count: 347

news.headline: Pentagon: There are about 2,000 troops now in Syria.
In 2024, Coinbase sees a surge in advanced trading with derivatives, indicating increased interest from pro traders in crypto.
news.summary: The derivative trading sector experienced significant expansion, indicating a strong interest from professional traders in gaining exposure to digital currencies.

news.headline: Ranger Investments earns PSN Top Guns 6 Star Designation for micro-cap growth strategy - a boutique investment manager out of Dallas.
news.summary: A company based in Dallas, Ranger Investment Management, L.P. (Ranger Investments), known for focusing on small- and micro-cap U.S. growth strategies, has recently earned a spot on the PSN Top Guns List. This list recognizes high-performing separate accounts, managed portfolios, or investment strategies. The achievement highlights the success of Ranger Investments in delivering strong performance in the financial market. The company's specialization in small- and micro-cap U.S. growth strategies have notably contributed to its recognition.

news.headline: Array Behavioral Care obtains HITRUST e1 Certification, showcasing commitment to cybersecurity. Located in Mount Laurel, N.J. - Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: Array Behavioral Care has received HITRUST e1 Certification, confirming their dedication to essential cybersecurity controls and information risk management. This achievement was announced in Mount Laurel, New Jersey on December 19, 2024. Array Behavioral Care is recognized as the top virtual psychiatry and therapy practice in the nation.

news.headline: Jain Center of Southern California opens Gyan Mandir temple on Nov 16, 2024, celebrating the teachings of the Tirthankaras.
news.summary: Renowned doctors Jasvant and Meera Modi showcased their visionary philanthropy by commemorating the teachings of the Tirthankaras. In a ceremony held on November 16, 2024, the Jain Center of Southern California (JCSC) unveiled the Gyan Mandir, a stunning and detailed architectural marvel. Located in Buena Park, California, this significant event marks a momentous occasion in the community with widespread recognition.

news.headline: ADATA Technology will exhibit AI innovations at CES 2025 from Jan. 7-10, showcasing high-performance products.
news.summary: At CES 2025, ADATA Technology, a top memory module and flash memory brand, will present its cutting-edge products. The event is scheduled from Jan. 7 to Jan. 10. The ADATA Group, encompassing the gaming brand XPG and industrial-grade embedded storage brand ADATA Industrial, will also be part of the showcase.

news.headline: HHS mandates updated NCPDP telecommunication standard, Batch Standard Subrogation Guide for Medicaid, improving pharmacy transactions.
news.summary: A requirement has been issued for the use of updated editions of NCPDP's Telecommunication Standard and NCPDP Batch Standard. In addition, the standard for Medicaid pharmacy subrogation transactions has been adapted to conform to NCPDP's Batch Standard Subrogation Implementation Guide. These adjustments aim to enhance interoperability and streamline workflow processes.

news.headline: Bethany Casagranda, DO, MBA, named Chief Medical Officer of Allegheny Health Network, leading network's clinical transformation.
news.summary: Bethany Casagranda, DO, MBA, who served as chair of AHN's Imaging Institute for an extended period, has been selected as the Chief Medical Officer for Allegheny Health Network. In this new role, she will be in charge of overseeing the network's physician organization and playing a key role in driving AHN's "Living Health" clinical transformation initiative. The appointment was announced on December 19, 2024, in Pittsburgh.

news.headline: Renew Medic is recognized as a Top 100 Game Changer by Franchise Dictionary Magazine for 2024, for its impact on the cabinet restoration industry.
news.summary: Renew Medic™ has been selected as one of the "Top 100 Game Changers" for 2024 by Franchise Dictionary Magazine. This recognition celebrates Renew Medic's influence on the specialty cabinet restoration sector, as well as its innovative tactics and dedication to establishing higher levels of quality.

news.headline: Webbula names Tim Fitzgerald as new COO to oversee operations. Fitzgerald brings extensive experience to the role.
news.summary: Webbula, a prominent company specializing in email hygiene, data append services, and data aggregation, has recently appointed Tim Fitzgerald as its new Chief Operating Officer (COO). With his vast experience, Fitzgerald will be responsible for managing the company's operations.

news.headline: Guardian Alarm expands in Cincinnati with acquisition of ProAlert, growing presence in Ohio. Largest Midwest security provider. (Characters: 110)
news.summary: A prominent full-service security provider in the Midwest has successfully finalized another acquisition to expand its operations in Ohio. Based in SOUTHFIELD, Mich., Guardian Alarm, known as the largest independent security services company in the region, disclosed this development on Dec. 19, 2024.

news.headline: San Gorgonio Memorial Hospital chooses HygenX.AI's robot RAY™ for disinfecting facilities, including ORs and ICUs.
news.summary: A robotics company, HygenX Ai, is transforming healthcare with autonomous robotic UV-C disinfection technology. They recently revealed that San Gorgonio Memorial Hospital (SGMH) chose their product, RAY™, to improve the disinfection process in its facilities. This includes operating rooms, intensive care units, and other key areas. The decision highlights the hospital's commitment to cutting-edge solutions, with RAY™ set to play a crucial role in maintaining sanitation standards. This move demonstrates the increasing adoption of robotics in healthcare, with SGMH joining the trend by investing in this advanced technology.

news.headline: Drupal 7 security support ends on 5 Jan 2025 after 14 years; urgent to update to avoid risks - PORTLAND, Ore., Dec. 19, 2024
news.summary: On January 5, 2025, Drupal 7 security support will cease after fourteen years since its launch, posing security risks and compatibility problems for websites that continue to operate on this version. As of December 19, 2024, this announcement was made from Portland, Oregon.

news.headline: Iranian filmmaker Hassan Najafi is renowned for his compelling storytelling in Iranian cinema, focusing on themes like tradition and identity.
news.summary: An accomplished Iranian filmmaker, Hassan Najafi has solidified his reputation as a skilled storyteller in the world of Iranian cinema. Through his movies, he delves into themes such as tradition, morality, identity, and resilience. His work is highly regarded by audiences both in Iran and globally due to its cultural authenticity and depth.

news.headline: techfrederick's 2024 Techie Awards attracted 130 attendees in Frederick, Md., celebrating local tech innovators.
news.summary: The recent event exceeded expectations compared to the previous year, with more than 130 individuals in attendance. Held in Frederick, Md. on December 19, 2024, techfrederick, a nonprofit committed to fostering the technology sector's development in Frederick County, successfully organized the gathering.

news.headline: PKF O'Connor Davies opens office in Fort Lauderdale, Florida to expand operations. Large accounting firm nationwide.
news.summary: A new office has been opened by PKF O'Connor Davies, a leading accounting, tax, and advisory firm in the United States, in the bustling downtown area of Fort Lauderdale, Southeast Florida. The expansion marks a strategic move for the company to further strengthen its presence in the region. This new location will serve as a key hub for the firm's operations in the area, providing services to a wide range of clients. The opening of the office in Fort Lauderdale demonstrates PKF O'Connor Davies' commitment to growth and client service. This development comes as part of the firm's ongoing expansion efforts, aiming to better cater to the needs of businesses and individuals in the region.

news.headline: Customers can now paint select Simpson Door Company exterior wood doors black or dark colors under warranty, creating stylish entrances.
news.summary: Simpson Door Company, a prominent custom wood doors manufacturer, has introduced a new product performance solution allowing customers to paint specific exterior wood doors black or any dark color to enhance their home entrance. The innovation was unveiled in McCleary, Washington, on December 19, 2024. This offering is set to make a statement, providing homeowners with the opportunity to customize their doors for a unique and striking appearance.

news.headline: Miami-Dade sees single-family home sales rise in Nov 2024, set to surpass last year's total soon.
news.summary: In November 2024, there was a notable year-over-year rise in single-family home sales in Miami-Dade County. The real estate market is on track to surpass the total number of homes sold last year by the end of next month. This data comes from the MIAMI Association of Realtors and the Miami Southeast Florida Multiple Listing Service.

news.headline: Workit Health launches online addiction clinic in Arizona, providing at-home access for substance use disorders treatment.
news.summary: Arizonan residents can now access licensed providers, medication, and treatment for substance use disorders from the comfort of their homes. This service is provided by Workit Health, a leading telehealth treatment provider. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, from Scottsdale, Arizona. This initiative aims to provide convenient and evidence-based support to individuals struggling with substance use disorders.

news.headline: Contego Medical treats first patients with Neuroguard IEP System, a 3-in-1 device for carotid artery disease in Raleigh, NC.
news.summary: A breakthrough has been achieved by an interventional neuroradiologist and interventional cardiologist who recently conducted the initial commercial procedures using a novel 3-in-1 tool designed for treating carotid artery disease. The milestone was reached in Raleigh, North Carolina, on December 19, 2024, as announced by Contego Medical. This marks a significant advancement in the medical field, with the successful utilization of this unique device.

news.headline: Pure Dental Health in Atlanta introduces zirconia implants as metal-free, biocompatible alternative to titanium implants.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Pure Dental Health has recently introduced zirconia implants as part of their services, catering to patients with metal sensitivities or aesthetic preferences. These metal-free implants are highly biocompatible and offer a more visually appealing option compared to traditional titanium implants. This new offering reflects the clinic's commitment to advancing patient care. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, by Pure Dental Health.

news.headline: Bristol Myers Squibb's stock receives a strong 83 RS rating, surpassing the 80-plus level.
news.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has achieved an impressive Relative Strength Rating of 83. This indicates a strong performance compared to other stocks in the market.

news.headline: Jabil stock receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade indicating improved technical performance.
news.summary: Jabil recently received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. The upgrade suggests an improvement in the company's standing, reflecting positive growth potential. This development is significant for investors and market analysts tracking Jabil, underscoring the company's strong performance.

news.headline: Nike to reveal fiscal Q2 2025 results soon; anticipated to face challenges as second-worst Dow stock.
news.summary: On Thursday, Nike released its fiscal Q2 2025 results, revealing a challenging quarter for the athletic retailer. As the second-worst performing stock in the Dow this year, investors were eager to hear about Nike's turnaround efforts. Analysts had anticipated a tough quarter for the company. The post on Investor's Business Daily discussed the expectations surrounding Nike's financial performance.

news.headline: Eversource recognized for being among America’s Most Responsible Companies for 6th year by Newsweek.
news.summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) has been named one of America’s Most Responsible Companies for 2025 for the sixth consecutive year. This recognition by Newsweek and Statista Inc. showcases the company’s dedication to environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) efforts. The award underscores Eversource's strong commitment to sustainability across its operations and a workplace culture focused on embracing values of responsibility.

news.headline: France's PM Bayrou: I would keep open the option of using special constitutional powers to get budget through parliament if needed.
Boyne Resorts partners with Consumers Energy for clean energy, powering Boyne Mountain Resort and Bay Harbor Golf Club.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan on December 19, 2024, Consumers Energy and Boyne Resorts revealed a joint initiative to supply Boyne Mountain Resort and Bay Harbor Golf Club with clean energy. This partnership aims to introduce additional renewable energy into Michigan's electricity network.
